description: Send notifications to your own PagerDuty destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise pagerduty:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native PagerDuty Events API v2 payload delivered straight to events.pagerduty.com.
name: msg-to-pagerduty

request.template: {"urls":"pagerduty://${ customer_secrets.PAGERDUTY_INTEGRATIONKEY }@${ customer_secrets.PAGERDUTY_APIKEY }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"pagerduty://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.integrationkey_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"routing_key":{* _escape_json(${ customer_secrets.PAGERDUTY_ROUTING_KEY }) *},"event_action":"trigger","payload":{"summary":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and " — " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"source":{* _escape_json(${ customer_secrets.PAGERDUTY_SOURCE }) *},"severity":"error"}}

{"routing_key":{* _escape_json(${ customer_secrets.PAGERDUTY_ROUTING_KEY }) *},"event_action":"trigger","payload":{"summary":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and " — " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"source":{* _escape_json(${ customer_secrets.PAGERDUTY_SOURCE }) *},"severity":"error"}}
